2183340.name: Keystone Library
2183340.description:
Step into Keystone Library, a growing collection of story-driven games where every book offers a unique adventure. From epic fantasy to gritty cyberpunk, each story is brought to life with handcrafted illustrations, custom-composed music, and immersive gameplay.

Discover RPG quests, tactical battles, puzzles, and character progression, all controlled through an intuitive keyword-based interface. Whether you're solving mysteries, embarking on daring quests, or exploring strange new worlds, Keystone Library offers something for everyone.

Designed for readers, writers, artists, and gamers who love rich stories and creative expression, the library continues to expand. With each update, new books introduce fresh stories, environments, and challenges, making every chapter a new journey.

Currently in Early Access, Keystone Library will remain a work in progress until at least three complete books are available. Join us now to explore the first stories, share your feedback, and help shape the library’s future.
2183340.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
